channel.title: Prog. Mater. Sci.
channel.description: Filtered papers from Prog. Mater. Sci.

item.title: Toward the Intelligent Robotics Era: Multimodal Flexible Haptic Sensors for Advanced Perception Systems
item.description:
Publication date: November 2026

Source: Progress in Materials Science, Volume 162

Author(s): Sili Ding, Feng Xu, Jie Chen, Siyu Liang, Hongjian Zhang, Wei Huang

item.title: Nucleic Acid–metal Hybrid Nanomaterials: Property-Driven Design for Biosensing, Bioimaging, and Therapeutics
item.description:
Publication date: November 2026

Source: Progress in Materials Science, Volume 162

Author(s): Chang Lu, Juewen Liu, Leyu Wang

item.title: Emerging Biomaterials for Sustainable Innovation: Advancements in Smart Wearable Devices and Self-Powered Technologies
item.description:
Publication date: January 2027

Source: Progress in Materials Science, Volume 163

Author(s): Amirthavarshini Muthuraman, Archana Pandiyan, Loganathan Veeramuthu, Hemanth Jawaharlal, Snekaa Babu, Chen-Wei Fan, To-Ho Chao, Wei-Hung Chiang, Ye Zhou, Chi-Ching Kuo

item.title: Machine Learning in Aerogels: From Performance Analytics to Design Optimization and Property Prediction
item.description:
Publication date: November 2026

Source: Progress in Materials Science, Volume 162

Author(s): Zahra Amiri, Omid Aghababaei Tafreshi, Hangyu Song, Zia Saadatnia, Chul B. Park, Hani E. Naguib
